# 

> Vite & Vue Powered Static Site Generator

Markdown to beautiful docs in minutes

## Table of Contents

- [/bin/bash](/docs-v1/guide/test.md)
- [Asset Handling](/docs-v1/guide/asset-handling.md): Learn how to reference and handle static assets such as images, media, and fonts in .
- [Badge](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-badge.md): Use the Badge component to add status labels to headers in  documentation.
- [Build-Time Data Loading](/docs-v1/guide/data-loading.md): Load arbitrary data at build time using  data loaders and import it from pages or components.
- [Carbon Ads](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-carbon-ads.md): Integrate Carbon Ads into your  site using the default theme's built-in support.
- [ClickHouse Cloud + PeerDB Setup Guide](/docs-v1/guide/peer-db.md)
- [Command Line Interface](/docs-v1/reference/cli.md): Reference of  CLI commands including dev, build, preview, and init.
- [Connecting to a CMS](/docs-v1/guide/cms.md): Connect  to a headless CMS using dynamic routes and data loaders.
- [Default Theme Config](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-config.md): Reference of all configuration options available for the  default theme.
- [Deploy Your  Site](/docs-v1/guide/deploy.md): Deploy your  site to popular platforms like Netlify, Vercel, GitHub Pages, and more.
- [Edit Link](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-edit-link.md): Display an edit link on doc pages to let users suggest changes on GitHub or GitLab.
- [Extending the Default Theme](/docs-v1/guide/extending-default-theme.md): Customize and extend the  default theme with custom CSS, components, layouts, and slots.
- [Footer](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-footer.md): Configure the global footer displayed at the bottom of  pages.
- [Frontmatter](/docs-v1/guide/frontmatter.md): Learn how to use YAML frontmatter in  Markdown files to control page-level metadata and behavior.
- [Frontmatter Config](/docs-v1/reference/frontmatter-config.md): Reference of all available frontmatter configuration options for  Markdown pages.
- [Getting Started](/docs-v1/guide/getting-started.md): Get up and running with . Learn how to install, scaffold, and start developing your documentation site.
- [Home Page](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-home-page.md): Configure the  default theme home page layout with hero sections, features, and custom content.
- [Internationalization](/docs-v1/guide/i18n.md): Set up internationalization (i18n) in  to support multiple languages for your site.
- [Last Updated](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-last-updated.md): Show the last updated timestamp on  pages based on Git commit history.
- [Layout](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-layout.md): Choose between doc, page, and home layouts in the  default theme.
- [Markdown Extensions](/docs-v1/guide/markdown.md): built-in Markdown extensions including custom containers, code blocks with syntax highlighting, line highlighting, code groups, and more.
- [Migration from  0.x](/docs-v1/guide/migration-from-vitepress-0.md)
- [Migration from VuePress](/docs-v1/guide/migration-from-vuepress.md)
- [MPA Mode&#x20;](/docs-v1/guide/mpa-mode.md): Enable MPA (Multi-Page Application) mode in  for zero-JavaScript pages with better initial performance.
- [Nav](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-nav.md): Configure the navigation bar in the  default theme including site title, logo, and menu links.
- [Prev Next Links](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-prev-next-links.md): Customize the previous and next page links displayed at the bottom of doc pages in .
- [Routing](/docs-v1/guide/routing.md): Understand  file-based routing, dynamic routes, clean URLs, and path rewrites.
- [Runtime API](/docs-v1/reference/runtime-api.md): Reference of  runtime APIs including composables, helper functions, and built-in components.
- [Search](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-search.md): Set up local or Algolia-powered search for your  site.
- [Sidebar](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-sidebar.md): Configure the sidebar navigation in the  default theme with groups, collapsible sections, and multiple sidebars.
- [Site Config](/docs-v1/reference/site-config.md): Complete reference of  site configuration options including app-level settings, theming, and build options.
- [Sitemap Generation](/docs-v1/guide/sitemap-generation.md): Generate a sitemap.xml file for your  site to improve search engine discoverability.
- [SSR Compatibility](/docs-v1/guide/ssr-compat.md): Ensure your  theme components and custom code are compatible with server-side rendering.
- [Team Page](/docs-v1/reference/default-theme-team-page.md): Create team pages with member profiles using  built-in team components.
- [Topic: **Build a website to introduce tours and book tours online**](/docs-v1/guide/travel-easy.md)
- [Untitled](/docs-v1/guide/graduation-project.md)
- [Untitled](/docs-v1/guide/award.md)
- [Using a Custom Theme](/docs-v1/guide/custom-theme.md): Create and use a custom theme in  to fully control the look and feel of your site.
- [Using Vue in Markdown](/docs-v1/guide/using-vue.md): Use Vue components and dynamic templating features directly inside Markdown files in .
- [What is ?](/docs-v1/guide/what-is-vitepress.md): is a static site generator designed for building fast, content-centric websites powered by Vite and Vue.
